from_location: Bennett Bay bridge in Kootenai County
source_note: Idaho Code §40-513 designates the Bennett Bay bridge on I-90 as the Veterans Memorial Centennial Bridge.

from_location: Snake River Canyon bridge south of I-84 near Twin Falls
source_note: Idaho Code §40-513A designates the bridge spanning the Snake River Canyon on US-93 as the I.B. Perrine Bridge.
Idaho Code §40-513B designates the US-95 canyon segment between Midvale and Cambridge as the Stu Dopf Memorial Highway.
Idaho Code §40-513C designates the Idaho portion of I-90 as the Purple Heart Trail.

highway_name: North Idaho Medal of Honor Highway
source_note: Idaho Code §40-513D designates State Highway 3 between US-12 and I-90 as the North Idaho Medal of Honor Highway.
Idaho Code §40-513E designates the Idaho portion of I-84 as the Vietnam Veterans Memorial Highway.
Idaho Code §40-513F designates the Idaho portion of US-20 as the Idaho Medal of Honor Highway.
Idaho Code §40-513G designates the Idaho portion of US-26 from Oregon to Wyoming as the POW/MIA Memorial Highway.
Idaho Code §40-513H designates the portion of State Highway 6 near Potlatch (US-95 to western city limits) as the Bobby Chambers Memorial Highway.
